name: canonical_product
description: Canonical structure for a normalized catalog product. parse_supplier_feed maps a supplier's raw feed rows into this shape; downstream tools validate, categorize, and report on them.
_TODO_step_4: Define the full canonical shape below. The `retail-solution` branch is the answer key.
Required: sku, gtin, brand, title, supplier_category, price{amount, currency}.
Optional: canonical_category (filled by map_to_canonical_taxonomy), attributes, dimensions, images[].
Keep this file valid JSON — the /api/schemas endpoint serves it as-is.

supplier_category.description: Raw free-text category from the feed.
